Off Calendar Apr-11-2007 Continued To Apr-25-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Paul Judge appearing for petitioners. Michele Jacobson appearing for respondent Donald Holloway. Parties were unable to resolve the case. Mr. Judge requested for Early Settlement Conference. Mr. Judge has received the accounting. The accounting is not filed. Court wants the accounting filed with all the requirements by 4/20. Matter is continued to 4/25. If the accounting is filed and hearing date set, no appearance is required on 4/25. Hearing on the petition for removal will be continued to the same date as the hearing on accounting.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: R. Guitron.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Reset--Petition For Removal Of Trustee, For An Accounting, For Appointment Of Successor Trustee And For Return Of All Unauthorized Distribtions Filed On 8/8/06.
Off Calendar Jan-30-2007 Continued To Apr-11-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Paul Judge appearing for petitioners. Jessica Holloway is in Court. She has POA from Jasmen Holloway. Michelle Jacobson appearing for respondent Donald Holloway. The respondent has agreed to provide an accounting within 30 days. Both parties will get an appraisal on the real property and they agreed to be referred to mediation. Court is referring this matter to the Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed not later than 3/27. Matter is continued to 4/11 at 9:00am for status on mediation. The respondent is ordered to file the accounting by 2/28. Mr. Judge will prepare an order after hearing.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR# 7782. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

At 10:32am, Mr. Judge returned to court and stated he has spoken to Mr. Frumkin and another attorney Michelle Jacobson from his office was supposed to be in court this morning. Matter is continued to 1/30/07 at 10:30am. Mr. Judge to notify other counsel,
